evals.expected_output: Exports current session to markdown with auto-generated summary and tags. File created in outputs/ai-sessions/ with YAML frontmatter and full conversation text. User sees confirmation with filename, summary, tags, and note (if provided).
Exports current session with user-provided note included in frontmatter and displayed in output message. Note appears in markdown file and in terminal confirmation.

Exports past session (by ID) to specified project folder. Creates outputs/ai-sessions/ if needed. Auto-generates summary and tags from that session's conversation. Displays success message with file path and metadata.
